acceptPreview.emptyDescription: No preview data is available for this invoice
acceptPreview.formulaDescription: The new price is calculated using the weighted average of old stock and new incoming stock to ensure accurate pricing
acceptPreview.formulaExample: Example: If old stock is 60 at a price of 60 EGP, and incoming stock is 554 at a price of 100 EGP, then the new price = (60×60 + 100×554) ÷ 614 = 99 EGP
acceptPreview.hasErrorsDescription: Some items have errors and must be reviewed before you can proceed with accepting this invoice
acceptPreview.previewReady: Preview is ready — review changes before accepting

bulkUpload.title: Bulk Order Upload
bulkUpload.description: You can upload a large number of orders at once using an Excel file (a template compatible with order creation, without IDs)
bulkUpload.step1Description: Download the Excel template and fill it with order data (OrderRef, customer, product SKU, quantity, price, etc.)
bulkUpload.step2Description: Fill in customer and order details carefully. Use the same OrderRef for all rows of the same order, and use the product SKU code.
bulkUpload.dragDrop: Drag the file here or click to choose
bulkUpload.uploadNoCreated: No orders were created. Check the file and errors.
bulkUpload.errorReportGenerated: Errors found! Error report downloaded. Fix and reupload.

distribution.title: Order Distribution
distribution.normalDescription: Distribute orders to a specific employee
distribution.selectEmployeeAndOrders: Please select an employee and orders
distribution.selectStatusToLoadOrders: Select a status to load available orders
distribution.noFreeOrders: No available orders in this range
distribution.selectStatusFirst: Select a status first to show orders
distribution.noOrdersAvailable: No orders available for this status
distribution.selectStatusToSeePreview: Please select statuses first to preview distribution
distribution.noOrdersAvailableForSelection: No orders available based on the selected statuses or dates

retrySettings.globalDescription: Control the automatic customer contact flow and route orders after the response timeout ends

duplicates.title: Duplicate Detection
duplicates.subtitle: Configure how the system identifies and handles duplicate orders
duplicates.windowDesc: The timeframe (in hours) to look back for orders with the same phone and items
duplicates.autoCancelDesc: If enabled, detected duplicate orders will be automatically marked as DUPLICATE

sync.skuFallbackTitle: Match products by SKU when not linked
sync.skuFallbackDesc: When an order arrives from a connected store and no sync mapping exists for the product, the system attempts to find a local variant by SKU before moving the order to pending orders.
sync.storesSubtitle: Control automatic product sync for each integrated store. Changes apply immediately.
sync.noConnectedStores: No connected stores yet. Connect a store from Store Integrations first.

warehouse.flowSubtitle: Determine where orders move after they are confirmed
warehouse.flowHint: Enabling Warehouse mode routes orders to the dedicated 'Warehouse' tab for operational management. Direct Shipping bypasses the warehouse flow and ships orders immediately.

retrySettings.enableRetryDesc: If the customer does not answer, the system automatically retries contacting them several times until the order is received or retries are exhausted
retrySettings.retryLimitsSubtitle: How many times the system tries, and how long it waits between attempts
retrySettings.maxRetriesDesc: The number of times the system tries to contact the customer before stopping and changing the order status (3 is recommended)
retrySettings.retryIntervalDesc: The number of minutes the system waits before making the next attempt
retrySettings.workingHoursDesc: When enabled, the system will not send any attempts outside the specified hours — useful to avoid disturbing customers at night
retrySettings.autoMoveTitle: Automatically move the order after retries end
retrySettings.autoMoveSubtitle: If the customer does not respond after all attempts, the order automatically moves to another status you choose
retrySettings.autoMoveHint: Example: choose "No Response" or "Under Review" so the order appears in a list that needs manual follow-up

autoAssignment.title: Automatic Assignment
autoAssignment.subtitle: Configure automatic order assignment settings
autoAssignment.disabledDesc: New orders will not be assigned automatically.
autoAssignment.immediateDesc: Run assignment rules as soon as a new order arrives.
autoAssignment.delayTimeDesc: Choose how long to wait before running the assignment rules.

retrySettings.retryStatusesSubtitle: The system automatically retries contact only when the order is in one of these statuses
retrySettings.retryStatusesHint: Example: choose "Pending Confirmation" and "Pending" — orders in these statuses are the ones the team contacts
retrySettings.confirmationStatusesTitle: Statuses that employees are allowed to update orders to
retrySettings.confirmationStatusesSubtitle: If the order reaches one of these statuses, the system stops retrying and considers it completed
retrySettings.confirmationStatusesHint: Example: choose "Confirmed" and "Paid" — once the order reaches this status, there is no need to call again

shipping.autoSendDesc: When the order reaches the specified trigger status, the system automatically creates a shipment without manual intervention
shipping.routingDesc: Choose the shipping company and define the status that triggers shipping
shipping.noCompanies: No active shipping companies — enable one from integrations settings
shipping.triggerStatusDesc: As soon as the order moves to this status, the system automatically sends it to the shipping company
shipping.paymentOptionsDesc: Define the payment requirement the system should check before approving shipment
shipping.requireFullPaymentDesc: The order will not be shipped unless fully paid — disable this to allow partial payment
shipping.autoShipAfterWarehouseDesc: If active, orders will be automatically assigned to the chosen shipping company once they reach the warehouse stage, hiding the manual shipment tab.
shipping.partialThresholdDesc: Enter the minimum percentage of the order total that must be paid upfront for it to be sent to shipping — leave at "0" to accept any amount
shipping.requirePaymentConfirmDesc: A supervisor must review and approve the payment manually before automatic shipping starts
shipping.otherOptionsDesc: What the system does automatically after successfully creating the shipment
shipping.autoLabelDesc: After creating the shipment, the system generates a PDF label and attaches it to the order
shipping.notifyOnShipmentDesc: Send a notification to the assigned employee as soon as shipping is completed successfully
shipping.allowReturnDesc: This option allows reverse shipments (returns) to be created directly through the selected shipping company
shipping.disabledHint: Enable the toggle above so the system automatically sends confirmed orders to the shipping company once they reach a certain status

stock.title: Stock Management
stock.subtitle: Control when inventory is deducted from your warehouse
stock.deductionStrategyDesc: Choose the exact point in the order lifecycle when items should be removed from available stock
stock.reservedEnabledDesc: When enabled, items in new orders are reserved (held) and subtracted from 'Available Stock' to prevent over-selling. This is a virtual hold and not a physical deduction from 'Stock on Hand'. If the order is canceled or returned, the reserved items are automatically released.

retrySettings.notifyEmployeeDesc: The assigned employee receives a notification every time the system tries to contact the customer
retrySettings.notifyAdminDesc: A notification is sent to the admin when all attempts end with no response — to follow up on delayed orders
retrySettings.notificationPreviewText: Reminder: Order #12345 has not been confirmed yet — please follow up with the customer

orders.title: Automation Runs

callCenter.title: Order Assignment
callCenter.emptySubtitle: No records match your search criteria

labels.searchPlaceholder: Search by rule name or description...
labels.emptySubtitle: Try adding a new rule to get started

form.name: Rule Name
form.weekDaysNote: If no days are selected, all days are enabled.

validation.employeesRequired: At least one employee must be selected
validation.productsRequired: At least one product must be selected
validation.citiesRequired: At least one city must be selected
validation.storesRequired: At least one store must be selected

kpiDescription.totalSales: Total revenue (total amount) from all orders delivered
kpiDescription.costOfGoods: Total cost of goods sold for delivered orders (sales minus profit)
kpiDescription.totalProfit: Total profit from all delivered orders. Profit is calculated as (Selling Price − Cost Price) for each item in the order
kpiDescription.profitMargin: Percentage of profit from total sales ((profit / sales) * 100)
kpiDescription.confirmRate: Percentage of orders that were confirmed (orders were confirmed at any time, not just those in confirmed status now). Calculated as ((confirmed orders / total orders) * 100)
kpiDescription.deliveryRate: Percentage of orders that were successfully delivered ((delivered orders / total orders) * 100)
kpiDescription.cancelled: Percentage of orders that were cancelled ((cancelled orders / total orders) * 100)
kpiDescription.returned: Percentage of orders that were returned ((returned orders / total orders) * 100)
kpiDescription.inDelivery: Number of orders currently in the shipping/delivery process
kpiDescription.newOrders: The total number of new orders created during the selected period
kpiDescription.totalOrders: Total number of all orders received
kpiDescription.correctedOrders: Total number of orders excluding duplicate, out of delivery area, and wrong number orders
kpiDescription.confirmedCount: Total number of orders that were confirmed at any time
kpiDescription.deliveredFromConfirmed: Total number of delivered orders that were previously confirmed. Calculated as ((delivered from confirmed / confirmed count) * 100)
kpiDescription.deliveredFromTotal: Total number of delivered orders out of all orders. Calculated as ((delivered / total orders) * 100)
kpiDescription.deliveredSales: Total revenue from delivered orders only
kpiDescription.canceledAndUnderReview: Total number of cancelled orders under follow-up. Orders are moved to this status automatically when an employee is assigned to a cancelled order.
kpiDescription.pendingOrders: The number of orders received from connected stores that could not be imported into the system. Common reasons include missing products, missing product variants (SKU), insufficient stock, invalid order data, or other import errors.
kpiDescription.inWarehouseOrders: Total number of orders in warehouse statuses (Distributed, Printed, Preparing, Ready, Packed, Shipped)
kpiDescription.outOfDelivery: Total number of orders out of delivery area
kpiDescription.wrongNumber: Total number of orders with wrong phone number
kpiDescription.new: The total number of new orders created during the selected period
kpiDescription.returnedOrders: Percentage of orders that were returned ((returned orders / total orders) * 100)
kpiDescription.canceled: Percentage of orders that were cancelled ((cancelled orders / total orders) * 100)
kpiDescription.confirmed: Total number of orders in confirmed status
kpiDescription.shipped: Number of orders currently in the shipping/delivery process
kpiDescription.noAnswerFollowUp: Total number of no-answer orders under follow-up. Orders are moved to this status automatically when an employee is assigned to a no-answer order.

header.title: All your commerce services... under
header.subtitle: Manage orders, shipping, inventory, and smart reports — easily and quickly.

cards.title: We manage your business completely from start to finish
cards.desc: A complete system to manage orders from receipt to delivery, with precise tracking at every step. We ensure your orders arrive quickly and safely while preserving your products better than any other system.

cards.title: Every product in its right place… and reaches your customer safely
cards.desc: The inventory system ensures organized products, with real-time updates and alerts. Accurate, it delivers every order quickly and safely and ensures successful fulfillment.

cards.title: Manage All Your Business Funds in One Place
cards.desc: Track balances across bank accounts and digital wallets, transfer funds between them, and automatically record every purchase, collection, profit, and expense. Stay in control with a complete financial history and real-time visibility.

dashboard.subtitle: Track your store performance moment by moment and control everything from one place.

Get accurate reports to make faster decisions
Track orders from confirmation to delivery

badges: Track orders from confirmation to delivery
See all products and quantities in real time
Get accurate reports to make faster decisions

lines.text: An advanced digital platform for e-commerce management, redefining the way
daily operations work for stores and companies.
Our platform is designed to be a single control center that connects
in one smart and seamless experience.

header.title: One Madar managing the entire order journey.
header.subtitle: Comprehensive order management… from placement to payment collection.
header.subtitle2: Every order flows in its own dedicated orbit from placement to delivery, without friction.

steps.title: Log in and Connect Your Store
steps.desc: Log into your account seamlessly, and link your online store in minutes to start syncing orders automatically.

steps.title: Connect shipping carriers and activate your store
steps.desc: Connect the shipping companies you work with, define coverage areas, shipping rates, and delivery statuses.

steps.title: Track your products, orders, and reports accurately
steps.desc: Monitor every product, every order, and get smart reports that help you manage your business quickly and intelligently.

header.title: Still Struggling With
header.subtitle: You're not alone — every e-commerce seller faces these hurdles. Here's how we solve them.

cards.title: Stop managing orders across multiple systems
cards.pain: Switching between different platforms to track orders wastes your team's time and makes daily operations harder to manage.
cards.solution: With Madar, all your orders appear in one place in real time, so you can manage them easily, fulfill them faster, and always stay on top of your business.

cards.title: Track every shipment from one place
cards.pain: Monitoring shipments across multiple carriers and answering customers' delivery status questions takes up a significant amount of your team's time every day.
cards.solution: With Madar, you can track every shipment in real time from a single dashboard, while customers receive automatic order updates, reducing support inquiries and giving you full visibility into every delivery.

cards.title: Cash-on-delivery returns cost more than you think
cards.pain: Every returned order means extra shipping costs, more operational work, and less profit, especially as your order volume grows.
cards.solution: With Madar, you can manage cash-on-delivery orders more effectively through pre-verification and order tracking, helping reduce return rates and protect your profits.

cards.title: High sales don't always mean high profits
cards.pain: A product may sell well, but returns or shipping costs can eat into its margins. Likewise, a shipping carrier could be costing you customers without you realizing it.
cards.solution: With Madar, all your business metrics and reports are in one place, so you can clearly see what's driving growth and what needs your attention.

cards.title: Is your inventory always out of sync with your sales?
cards.pain: Delayed inventory updates lead to incorrect orders, cancellations, and unhappy customers.
cards.solution: With Madar, inventory is automatically synchronized across all your sales channels in real time.

cards.title: Growth shouldn't require more manual work
cards.pain: Every new order adds more manual steps, more follow-up, and more opportunities for mistakes.
cards.solution: With Madar, your daily operations are automated, allowing you to grow your sales without growing your operational complexity.

cta.subtext: Ready to fix these for good? Join thousands of sellers who already ship smarter.
cta.label: Start Free Today

shippingNetwork.subheading: Track shipments, delivery statuses, and collections in real time from inside the platform.

heading.prefix: What our customers say about their experience

testimonials.subheading: See the success stories of customers who used our platform

r1.name: Ahmed Sami
r1.text: The platform made order management much easier for us. After using it, we were able to track orders, inventory, and shipping from one place without getting distracted. The integration with shipping companies saved us a lot of time and effort and made tracking more accurate and faster.

r2.name: Mariam Khaled
r2.text: The interface is very simple, and the team learned it quickly. Technical support is always helpful, and that helped us run our daily work smoothly without problems.

r3.name: Mohamed Fouad
r3.text: The platform saved us a lot of time and effort, and helped us track everything moment by moment. Integration with shipping companies made follow-up and collection much easier.

r4.name: Hesham Ali
r4.text: The platform helped us bring all operations into one place, from orders to inventory and shipping. It saved us a lot of time and effort, and also reduced daily errors.

r5.name: Nourhan Saeed
r5.text: A very smooth experience, tracking orders and shipping has become clear and easy. Technical support is always cooperative, and we felt our daily work became more organized.

r6.name: Rami Gad
r6.text: The platform saved us a lot of time and costs, and gave us complete visibility over all orders and inventory. Integration with shipping companies made tracking and collection easier.

r7.name: Sarah Al-Ghamdi
r7.text: One system, from selling to shipping and collection. Before the platform, we used more than one system and it was exhausting. Now everything is in one place.

r8.name: Laila Mostafa
r8.text: The reports are clear and accurate, and that helped us understand product and sales performance better. Integration with shipping companies was a game changer and saved us from many errors.

r9.name: Ahmed Fawzy
r9.text: The interface is very smooth, and it was easy for the whole team to use the platform. Technical support is fast and helpful, and that made the daily work experience very enjoyable.

r10.name: Mona Adel
r10.text: We needed a solution that brings all operations together in one place, and the platform was exactly what we were looking for. The continuous updates show that they listen to customer feedback.

heading.prefix: Everything you need to know... before

faq.subheading: Questions and answers about everything related to managing your orders.

q1.q: How do I start using the platform?
q1.a: After creating your account, you can immediately start adding products, connecting shipping companies, and managing orders from one easy-to-use dashboard.

q2.q: Can I manage orders from mobile?
q2.a: Yes, the platform is compatible with all devices including desktop, mobile, and tablet, and works smoothly from any browser without needing to install an app.

q3.q: Is the platform integrated with shipping companies?
q3.a: Yes, we support direct integrations with top shipping companies in the region such as Aramex, SMSA, FedEx, NAQEL, and others. You can connect more than one company depending on your plan.

q4.q: How do I deal with returns and replacements?
q4.a: The platform provides a complete return management system through which you can track the status of every return, update inventory automatically, and create detailed reports about replacements.

q5.q: Does the platform support SKU and barcode?
q5.a: Absolutely, the platform fully supports product management via SKU and barcode, making stock counting and accurate inventory tracking easier at any time.

latest_major.label: Auto-update to latest major version
latest_major.description: Automatically migrates the system from the current version to the latest active version (e.g., from 2.0 to 5.0) to apply new structural changes to failed workflows.

latest_patch.label: Auto-update to patch versions only (Recommended)
latest_patch.description: Automatically migrates the system within the same major version (e.g., from 2.0 to 2.4) to fix minor issues like missing templates without changing the core flow sequence.

manual.label: Manual intervention
manual.description: Keeps all processes on their current original version. In case of failure, you can review the log and manually update each execution individually.

statsDescription.productPurchases: Total cost of accepted purchase invoices (includes only invoices with status = ACCEPTED)
statsDescription.manualExpenses: Total amount of manual operating expenses
statsDescription.totalExpenses: Total expenses calculated as (product purchases + manual expenses)
statsDescription.returns: Total cost of accepted purchase returns
statsDescription.totalPurchases: Total amount of supplier purchases (sum of all accepted purchase invoices)
statsDescription.totalPaid: Total amount paid to suppliers (sum of purchase invoice paid amounts + supplier payments)
statsDescription.totalReceived: Total amount received from suppliers (sum of purchase return paid amounts)
statsDescription.finalBalance: The final balance to be paid to suppliers
statsDescription.lastMonthProfit: Net profit from the last closed month (revenue - product cost - operating expenses - returns cost)
statsDescription.currentRevenue: Current month's total revenue from delivered orders (final total - shipping cost)
statsDescription.productCost: Total cost of products from delivered orders during the selected period. Product Cost = Σ(Unit Cost × Quantity for delivered order items) − Σ(Unit Cost × Quantity for approved returned items).
statsDescription.returnsCost: Current month's total returns cost (sum of unit cost * quantity for all approved return items)
statsDescription.currentNetProfit: Current month's net profit (current revenue - product cost - operating expenses - returns cost)
statsDescription.totalBalance: Total current balance across all active accounts
statsDescription.totalIn: Total completed inflow transactions across all accounts
statsDescription.totalOut: Total completed outflow transactions across all accounts
statsDescription.accountsCount: Total number of active financial accounts
statsDescription.totalShouldCollect: The total amount required to be taken from the suppliers

MARKETING_DEFAULT.label: Default
MARKETING_DEFAULT.description: Send messages with media and custom buttons to engage your customers.
MARKETING_DEFAULT.goodFor: Welcome messages, promotions, coupons, newsletters, announcements

MARKETING_CALL_PERMISSIONS.label: Call Permissions Request
MARKETING_CALL_PERMISSIONS.description: Ask customers if you can call them on WhatsApp

UTILITY_DEFAULT.label: Default

UTILITY_DEFAULT.goodFor: Order updates, account alerts, shipping notifications, feedback requests

UTILITY_CALL_PERMISSIONS.label: Call Permissions Request

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this template?

form.title: Create WhatsApp Template
form.useCustomValidity: Set a custom validity period for your message
form.authOtpSecurity: For your security, do not share this code.
form.bodyPlaceholderPreview: Your message text will appear here...
form.copyCodeDesc: Basic authentication with fast setup. Your customers copy the code and paste it into your app.
form.authContentDesc: Authentication message template content cannot be modified. You can add additional content from the options below.
form.validityDesc: It is recommended to set a custom validity period during which your authentication message should be delivered before it expires. If the message is not delivered within this time frame, you will not be charged and your customer will not see the message.
form.standardValidity: If you do not set a custom validity period, the standard WhatsApp message validity of 10 minutes will apply.
form.variableSamplesDesc: Include samples for all variables in your message to help Meta review your template. Remember not to include any real customer information to protect their privacy.

mediaUpload.title: Upload {type}
mediaUpload.dragAndDrop: Drag and drop {type} or choose a file
mediaUpload.policyNote: Please ensure the {type} you send complies with our Terms of Service policy.

buttonsBuilder.title: Buttons
buttonsBuilder.urlExampleInfo: To help us review your message template, please add an example website link. Do not use real customer information.
buttonsBuilder.dynamicUrlError: The URL must include the variable {{1}}
buttonsBuilder.phoneRequired: You need to enter a phone number. Please add a valid phone number.
buttonsBuilder.limitDesc: Add up to {total} buttons to help customers take action.
buttonsBuilder.copyCodeExampleInfo: To help us review your message template, please add an example copy code. Do not use real customer information.
buttonsBuilder.copyCodeExampleRequired: Please enter a valid copy code example
buttonsBuilder.urlExampleRequired: Please enter a valid website link

form.noAccountsInfo: Please add a WhatsApp account first to use these features.

validation.nameMax: Name must be at most {max} characters
validation.languageInvalid: Language must be Arabic or English
validation.headerTextMax: Header text must be at most 60 characters
validation.headerVarMax: At most one variable is allowed in the header
validation.bodyMax: Body must be at most {max} characters
validation.bodyVarEdges: The message cannot start or end with a variable
validation.bodyVarDensity: The text is too short for the number of variables used
validation.footerMax: Footer must be at most 60 characters
validation.buttonTextMax: Button label must be at most 25 characters
validation.visitWebsiteUrlRequired: URL is required for website buttons
validation.phoneButtonNumberRequired: Phone number is required for call buttons
validation.whatsappCallDaysRequired: Active days (1–30) are required for WhatsApp call buttons
validation.mediaHeaderFileRequired: Upload a file for this header type (image, video, or PDF)
validation.mediaHeaderMustReupload: Choose a header file again or keep the existing saved media
validation.variableSampleRequired: Example values are required for every variable in this section
validation.invalidParameterFormatNumber: This template contains variable parameters with incorrect formatting. Variable parameters must be whole numbers with two sets of curly brackets (for example, {{1}}, {{2}}).
validation.invalidParameterFormatNamed: This template contains variable parameters with incorrect formatting. Variable parameters must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores, enclosed in double curly braces, for example '{{customer_name}}' and '{{order_id}}'.
validation.countryCodeMax: Country code must be at most 10 characters
validation.phoneNumberMax: Phone number must be at most 20 characters
validation.buttonUrlRequired: URL is required for website buttons
validation.validityPeriodInvalid: Select a valid message validity period
validation.copyCodeExampleMax: Copy code example must be at most 20 characters

upsells.pageSubtitle: Manage and track product upsell offers

statsDescription.sent: Total number of upsell offers sent to customers (all records contribute to this count)
statsDescription.accepted: Number of upsells accepted by the customer (but order not yet delivered)
statsDescription.rejected: Number of upsells rejected by the customer
statsDescription.noAnswer: Number of upsells where the customer did not respond (still pending)
statsDescription.expired: Number of upsells where the customer accepted after the offer's time limit expired
statsDescription.acceptedNonEligible: Number of upsells accepted, but the order was already delivered or entered warehouse preparation (so upsell was no longer eligible)
statsDescription.failedToAdd: Number of upsells that failed to add to the order (due to insufficient stock, deleted/inactive product, etc.)
statsDescription.delivered: Number of upsells accepted and the order was successfully delivered

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this upsell?
